title: ZIP-317: sapling_logical_actions uses sum not max
description: ZIP-317 defines Sapling contribution as max(n_sapling_spends, n_sapling_outputs). The implementation does n_inputs + n_outputs. For (1,1) both formulas give 2 (accidentally correct). For (1,2) — one input, change output — sum=3→fee=15_000 but spec max=2→fee=10_000. User is overcharged 50% on every payment with change. The module docstring compounds the error by citing 'sapling_bundle_count * 2' which matches neither the spec nor the implementation. Spec: https://zips.z.cash/zip-0317
close_reason: Fixed: sapling_logical_actions now returns n_inputs.max(n_outputs) per ZIP-317 §2. Module docstring corrected. Affected tests updated with correct expected values from spec. Symmetry test added.
